title: Becoming Philosophy Site
summary: Build an elaborate TypeScript website that presents a becoming-first philosophical worldview through an intentional web experience, not just a generic essay shell.
acceptanceCriteria: Ship a coherent, runnable website rather than a static text dump.
Present a clear becoming-first thesis with original synthesis, not just namedrop-heavy summary.
Include both structured exposition and a more fragmentary or aphoristic exploratory mode.
Use at least one meaningful interactive conceptual surface such as a map, notebook, navigator, graph, or simulator.
Leave a readable repo with docs and at least one meaningful validation path.

candidates.label: Manifesto machine
candidates.promptHint: Prioritize a dramatic manifesto-like landing page with concept machinery, layered panels, and expressive interactions.

candidates.label: Concept atlas
candidates.promptHint: Prioritize a more navigable atlas of concepts, tensions, notebooks, and explanatory paths while still keeping a strong authored visual direction.

hiddenChecks.title: Repo text reflects the becoming-first thesis

profile.summary: Judge whether the website feels like an authored, elaborate philosophical experience rather than a generic essay site with decorative language.
priorities: Treat hidden checks as the structural floor, not the main meaning of success.
Prefer a few deep conceptual interactions over many adjacent panels or decorative modules.
reward: Coherent first-principles synthesis, strong information architecture, memorable interactions, and a visual language that supports process, tension, becoming, and negation.
A balance between structured explanation and more fragmentary or feverish exploratory surfaces.
A controlled amount of schizo-cosmic or Time-Cube-like provocation when it remains intellectually rich and legible.
penalize: Empty pseudo-profundity, philosopher name-dropping without synthesis, random sludge masquerading as depth, or polished UI with no real conceptual machinery.
opportunities: Suggest next moves that deepen the main conceptual machine or interaction loop instead of adding more disconnected surfaces.
